overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian city street at dusk. The scene features wet asphalt reflecting neon signs, palm trees, futuristic skyscrapers, and moderate pedestrian activity as the character moves from an underpass through a commercial district and under another overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under overpass with neon signage

events.description: pedestrian in red shirt walks past on the right side of the frame
white van drives past from left to right across the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking forward under the overpass and emerging onto the open street

notable_agents.action: white van driving across the intersection from left to right
person in red shirt walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure covering the left side of the frame
low-rise building with prominent red neon signage
two tall futuristic skyscrapers dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass on a wet city street at dusk. A building with red neon signage stands on the left while two tall skyscrapers dominate the distant skyline. A pedestrian in red passes by on the right, and a white van drives across the intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated sidewalk with metal railing overlooking city

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved sidewalk with a metal railing on the right side, approaching the commercial district

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the elevated sidewalk edge
tall cylindrical building with large rotating neon advertisements
palm trees lining the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a curved elevated sidewalk with a metal railing on the right, leaving the initial overpass behind. The cylindrical building with rotating neon ads becomes visible in the distance, and palm trees line the approach to the busier commercial area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with cylindrical billboard building and palm trees

events.description: crowd density increases as camera enters the busier commercial pedestrian area
approaching intersection and beginning to slow and turn right

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk passing pedestrians and storefronts, approaching an intersection near the cylindrical building

notable_agents.action: person in bright orange pants walking ahead of the camera
pedestrian in blue jacket walking in the same direction

entered.detail: ground-level commercial shops with awnings and signage
tall street lamps with glowing lights illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking alongside the prominent cylindrical building with rotating neon advertisements, the street is lined with palm trees and storefronts. Pedestrian traffic increases with people walking in various directions, and the camera approaches an intersection while passing parked cars and street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection under concrete overpass with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: turning right and entering the shadowed area under the concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and walking under the concrete overpass into a darker area

notable_agents.action: person in blue vest with back tattoo walking alongside under the overpass

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure creating a shadowed underpass ahead
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the intersection, leaving the cylindrical building and palm trees behind, and enters a darker area under a concrete overpass. The surroundings become more industrial with graffiti-covered walls, and the lighting shifts to low light as the character walks into the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim urban underpass through a vibrant commercial district and back into a shadowed industrial zone. It begins beneath a concrete overpass on a wet street at dusk, passing a building with red neon signs and a white van crossing the intersection. As the camera moves along a curved elevated sidewalk with a metal railing, the view opens up to reveal palm trees and a distant cylindrical building adorned with rotating neon advertisements. The scene then expands into a bustling commercial area filled with pedestrians and storefronts, gliding past parked cars and street lamps. Finally, the camera turns right at an intersection, leaving the bright lights behind to enter a darker, graffiti-covered underpass where the lighting shifts to a low, industrial gloom.
